content.en:
"I've seen the Lord of Infinity!"

"I've seen the Lord of Infinity!"

"I've seen the Lord of Infinity!"

After the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors saw Ye Tian coming, they all said respectfully.

Ye Tian was currently the only Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the Blood Yan Domain, and he was still a genius at the other side, and he was a member of Wind Tooth Island, so they naturally didn't dare to be disrespectful to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian saw the arrival of many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and nodded slightly.

Soon, the meeting began.

"Ladies and gentlemen, many Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors in our Terran Sacred Pavilion have been killed recently, and there are also many Heavenly Ancestors under your command, which force did this work?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Gu Heng of Gu Heng Mountain said: "Lord of Endless, this matter has not yet been investigated, I only know that even the primeval-level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm was killed silently, and no news was revealed." "

"We searched before, but we couldn't find it. Another Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor said.

Suddenly.

An Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor spoke: "Could it be that force, calculating the time, it should be about the same." "

As soon as these words came out, some Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors' faces suddenly changed.

"It's really possible that it's that force!"

"If it was really that force who did it, then we have nothing to do!"

"Not necessarily, you have to look it up, you can't just guess and give up investigating this matter. "

While these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were discussing, Ye Tian looked puzzled, he didn't know what these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were talking about.

"Guys, what kind of force are you talking about?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Eternal Zero said, "Lord of Endless, they're talking about the Shadow Ruins. "

Shadow Ruins?

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it.

The Lord of Eternal Zero continued: "The Shadow Ruins are very mysterious, the first time the Shadow Ruins appeared, they killed countless Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and the last group of Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors had to deal with the Shadow Ruins. As a result, Shadow Ruins was defeated and retreated to their headquarters. Those Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors slaughtered into the Shadow Ruins, and as a result, they suffered heavy losses. It's just because the Shadow Ruins suppress the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the outside world very much, but the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins is not suppressed. Since then, the Shadow Ruins have been attacking the Bone Transformation Realm of the Seventy-Two Eastern Domains every 100 million primeval eras. They are also very smart, they don't kill the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, they only kill the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor. "

"The Shadow Ruins have suppressed the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor from the outside world, so wouldn't it be okay to wait for the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins to come out and surround and kill him?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Can't do it!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero helplessly: "The Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins has mastered a secret technique that can be hidden silently and can also escape. Even if they are surrounded, they can easily escape and return to the Shadow Ruins. In short, if you want to kill a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins, you have to pay a lot of price. "

"Didn't Wind Tooth Island care about this?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"I don't know!" the Eternal Zero Lords shook their heads.

They don't know much about the Shadow Ruins, they only know that once the Shadow Ruins make a move, they can only endure and block the forces, so that they can reduce their losses.

And after the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins killed some Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, he would disappear again.

Subsequently.

These Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors contacted the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of other domains to find out the situation.

As a result, when he learned that other domains were like this, he had lost a lot of Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and he was immediately determined to be the so-called Shadow Ruins.

Ye Tian knew that these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't know much about the situation, so he was going to ask the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian came to find the Lord of Qingyun.

"Lord of Qingyun, do you know about the Shadow Ruins?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Shadow Ruins!" As soon as the Lord of Qingyun heard this name, he immediately frowned, and his face was solemn: "Endless Lord, have you seen the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins?"

Ye Tian talked about the situation in the east.

The Lord of Qingyun sighed, "It seems that the Shadow Ruins have done it again!"

"What kind of force is the Shadow Ruins, is it even more powerful than Wind Tooth Island?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Qingyun shook his head, "Shadow Ruins used to be inferior to our Wind Tooth Island, but now, it is about the same strength as our Wind Tooth Island. We're not afraid of the Shadow Ruins, but the Shadow Ruins are hard to deal with. "

"Shadow Ruins is located in the Shadow Ruins, and the Shadow Ruins are a force of the Shadow Ruins. The creatures in the shadow ruins are called the spirit of the shadow ruins, and the spirit of the shadow ruins is good at hiding and is also very powerful. The Shadow Ruins also have three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, if they stay in the Shadow Ruins, even if we Fengya Island invade the Shadow Ruins with all our might, they will suffer heavy losses, and they will not be able to kill the Shadow Ruins at all. "

"Of course, the Shadow Ruins are scattered all over the Shadow Ruins, and there are branches of the Shadow Ruins in the east, west, south, and north. The Shadow Ruins Spirits who killed those Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the eastern part of the Eternal Frontier belong to the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins. "

As soon as the Lord of Qingyun said this, Ye Tian knew more about the Shadow Ruins.

And.

He had also heard of the Ruins of Shadows, which was recorded in the inheritance of Stormtooth Island.

The Ruins of Shadows is a void mezzanine in the Land of Eternity, which lacks resources and is not suitable for the cultivation of creatures on the other side of Eternity, but there are also some special creatures born there.

Under normal circumstances, the creatures of the Shadow Ruins would hardly come to the Eternal Lands to do anything.

But the Shadow Ruins is an exception.

"Lord of Qingyun, why does the Shadow Ruins have to go to the east to kill those Bone Transformation Realm geniuses?" Ye Tian still didn't know the reason.

The Lord of Qingyun said: "Because the Shadow Ruins has a Blood Cave Demon Vine in its hands, this Blood Cave Demon Vine has the hope of giving birth to a Blood Cave Demon Fruit every 100 million primeval years, and the Blood Cave Demon Fruit will help the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor to impact the Origin Upper Realm, but the probability is very low. However, the Shadow Ruins are already short of resources, and it is difficult for them to grab the opportunity of the land on the other side of eternity. As a result, they could only hope for the Blood Cave Demon Vine. However, the Blood Cave Demon Vine needs to absorb the flesh and blood of living beings to give birth to the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, and the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor is more suitable. Shadow Ruins didn't dare to make a move against the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, otherwise it would cause public anger, and they would definitely resist desperately and die with Shadow Ruins. And killing a group of bone transformation realms, many forces will turn a blind eye and will not go crazy against the shadow ruins. "

"That's the reason!"

Ye Tian also thought that the Shadow Ruins killed those Bone Transformation Realm for other reasons, but he didn't expect that it was to let these Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors act as nutrients for the Blood Cave Demon Vine, just to fight for that slightest chance to become the Origin Upper Realm.

"Windtooth Island doesn't want to unite with other forces to destroy the Shadow Ruins together?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's not worth it. The Lord of Qingyun said, "The Shadow Ruins are just one of the top forces in the Shadow Ruins, and they are only targeting some forces in the east, south, west, and north. They haven't offended our Wind Tooth Island and other forces, do you think the Wind Tooth Island forces will be willing to destroy them at all costs and make themselves suffer heavy losses?"

When Ye Tian heard this, he also knew that what the Lord of Qingyun said was very reasonable.

In short, Wind Tooth Island will not help this time.

However, the ruins of the shadows did go too far this time, and dared to make a move against the Terran Holy Pavilion.

If Wind Tooth Island doesn't help, it doesn't mean that he will forget about it.

He had a way to target the Shadow Ruins. ~
